quoted_text:
What’s up market-mechanics crew, this rally may be telling us more about tariffs than actual copper scarcity

Macquarie argues that metal has been pulled toward the U.S. through the CME-LME arbitrage as traders position around possible tariffs of up to 50% on additional downstream copper products

That movement can create two different realities at once:

More copper stored in America
Less visible availability elsewhere
A wider regional pricing gap
An artificial feeling of global tightness

Chin

quoted_text:
The Marvelous Miss Mogas

Hi, I'm Miss Mogas. Lots of people call me different names, like gasoline, petrol or simply 'gas'. My real name is Motor Gasoline, so let me stick with Miss Mogas alright...

I'm very unique in the world of oil. Not only am I the rare female (you already met Mr Crude, Cowboy Crude and Grandpa Brent before), but I am also what oil folks call as 'a blend'. Yup, you can't get me straight out of any refining streams directly because I am a wonderful mix of multiple blending
